llm_operation.reason: MindSpore KLDivLoss requires two inputs (logits, labels) but test case only provides shape/dtype specs without actual tensor construction; TensorFlow KLDivergence expects y_true/y_pred positional args but init_params.reduction='none' is invalid — TF uses reduction='sum' or 'sum_over_batch_size' or None (not string 'none'), and loss must be called as loss(y_true, y_pred). Both errors stem from incorrect API usage: MS missing input tensors, TF misusing reduction and call signature.
